summary: The build request is to deploy the application to the Internet Computer network without making any code changes. However, the diff shows modifications to backend/main.mo (code changes) and project_state.json (state update). There are no deployment configuration files added (e.g., dfx.json changes, canister IDs, deployment scripts), suggesting the diff contains code changes rather than deployment artifacts.

hallucinated_features.description: Code changes were made to backend/main.mo, modifying the Motoko actor implementation
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request explicitly states 'Making any code changes before deployment' and 'Modifying any existing features or UI' are non-goals. The diff shows backend/main.mo was modified.
